methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $16M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Space & Aerospace (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 23 same-sector peers exist in Space & Aerospace, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Space & Aerospace P/S median is 59.8x across 6 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
Endurosat is a seed-stage Space & Aerospace company that has raised $167M+ to date. The valuation exercise draws on a comp universe of 5 public peers (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private peers including SpaceX, Rocket Lab, and Blue Origin, though narrow peer-stage alignment remains limited.

Stage-Progression represents the sole applicable method here. Using total raised ($167M+) as a proxy base and deriving a $16M normalized raised value, application of a typical 2.5x Seed-to-next-stage multiplier yields $40M. Peer-Median triangulation is not viable due to insufficient same-stage or adjacent-stage comparables within the Space & Aerospace sector—only 0 same-stage and 1 adjacent-stage peer met screening criteria. Public-Comp Anchoring cannot be applied because Endurosat's revenue is not disclosed; while the 6-ticker Space & Aerospace public median trades at 59.8x P/S, this multiple cannot be operationalized without the target's top-line figure.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $34M to $46M, centered at $40M. This range reflects uncertainty inherent in stage-progression alone and the absence of direct peer-multiple validation. Key uncertainties include the reliability of the total-raised proxy as a value anchor and the company's actual revenue profile, which would enable public-comp anchoring and strengthen conviction in the range.
